---
name: Feature request
about: Something you wish resumasher did that it doesn't.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem you're trying to solve

<!-- What were you doing that hit the wall? Example: "I applied to a German-language job posting and resumasher blocked because the JD wasn't in English. I'd expected it to translate." -->

## What would ideally happen

<!-- Describe the behavior you want, not the implementation. "When a non-English JD is detected, offer to translate it before proceeding." Don't jump to "add a --translate flag" — leave the how open unless you have strong opinions. -->

## What you tried / worked around

<!-- Optional. "I ran the JD through DeepL manually and pasted the English back in." Helps gauge how painful the workaround is. -->

## Who else would use this

<!-- Optional but valuable. "Anyone applying to German/French/Italian postings in DACH / EU markets" is more compelling than "me." -->

## Alternatives you considered

<!-- Optional. "We could block with a better error message instead of translating" — shows you've thought about the tradeoffs. -->
